parameters.command:
=# 验证必要变量
CATEGORY="{{ $('准备资源下载命令').first().json.category }}"
FILENAME="{{ $('准备资源下载命令').first().json.fileName }}"

# 调试输出
echo "DEBUG: CATEGORY='${CATEGORY}'"
echo "DEBUG: FILENAME='${FILENAME}'"

# 验证变量不为空
if [ -z "${CATEGORY}" ] || [ -z "${FILENAME}" ]; then
    echo "ERROR: 必要变量为空，跳过文件创建"
    echo "CATEGORY: '${CATEGORY}'"
    echo "FILENAME: '${FILENAME}'"
    exit 1
fi

# 构建路径
SLUG="${FILENAME%.md}"
BASE_PATH="/Users/matthewyin/Coding/nssa/src/content/posts"
FULL_PATH="${BASE_PATH}/${CATEGORY}/${SLUG}"

echo "DEBUG: SLUG='${SLUG}'"
echo "DEBUG: FULL_PATH='${FULL_PATH}'"

# 验证最终路径
if [[ "${FULL_PATH}" == *"//" ]] || [[ "${SLUG}" == "" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: 路径构建错误，跳过文件创建"
    echo "FULL_PATH: '${FULL_PATH}'"
    echo "SLUG: '${SLUG}'"
    exit 1
fi

# 创建目录和文件
mkdir -p "${FULL_PATH}/" && cat > "${FULL_PATH}/index.md" << 'EOFMARKER'
{{ $('准备资源下载命令').first().json.fileContent }}
EOFMARKER

echo "SUCCESS: 文件已创建 ${FULL_PATH}/index.md"

nodes.name: 保存合并后的文件到本地

parameters.command:
=# 重新构建文件名（与原逻辑保持一致）
CATEGORY="{{ $json.category }}"
ID_SUFFIX="{{ $json.id.slice(-8) }}"
FILENAME="${CATEGORY}-${ID_SUFFIX}"
TARGET_DIR="/Users/matthewyin/Coding/nssa/src/content/posts/${CATEGORY}/${FILENAME}"

# 调试输出
echo "CATEGORY: ${CATEGORY}"
echo "ID_SUFFIX: ${ID_SUFFIX}"
echo "FILENAME: ${FILENAME}"
echo "TARGET_DIR: ${TARGET_DIR}"
echo "Directory listing:"
ls -la "/Users/matthewyin/Coding/nssa/src/content/posts/${CATEGORY}/" 2>/dev/null || echo "Category directory not found"

# 检查目录是否存在
if test -d "${TARGET_DIR}"; then
    echo "RESULT: EXISTS"
else
    echo "RESULT: NOT_EXISTS"
fi

cd /Users/matthewyin/Coding/nssa && pwd && echo "=== Git Status ===" && git status && echo "=== Git Remote ===" && git remote -v && echo "=== Git Config ===" && git config --list | grep -E "(user|remote)" && echo "=== Checking for changes ===" && git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- && echo "No changes" || echo "Changes detected" && echo "=== Adding files ===" && git add . && echo "=== Git Status After Add ===" && git status && echo "=== Attempting commit ===" && git diff-index --quiet HEAD -- || (echo "Committing changes..." && git commit -m "自动发布：批量更新文档" && echo "Pushing to remote..." && git push)

nodes.name: 获取Google Dri nssa的子目录

main.node: 保存合并后的文件到本地
获取Google Dri nssa的子目录
